description: Use this API to remove a participating bus voltage magnitude variable from a specified OPF linear constraint dependency equation in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.6.0. ierr = purge_opf_lnceqn_vmag_2(iqid, eibus, enode)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: enode
parameters.description: The bus section number or the external node number of one of the nodes in the bus section of interest. specify 0 if bus is represented by a single bus section. if 0 is specified and bus is represented by multiple bus sections, the data of the parent bus and not that of the bus sections will be changed. (input).

error_codes.description: specified linear constraint equation does not exist.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
node not found in substation of bus.
node not connected to any bus section of bus in substation.
